overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a foggy morning stroll through the historic district of Saint Denis. The camera moves along cobblestone streets lined with Southern Gothic mansions, passing horse-drawn carriages and eventually approaching a grand estate with ornate iron gates.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the street
slight turn to the left while continuing forward along the avenue

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone street, observing the historic architecture and passing carriages

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with white horses moving along the street

entered.detail: large white columned mansion with brick fence and iron railings
black carriage with white horses and driver
wet cobblestone road surface reflecting the foggy light
mature trees with spanish moss lining the street
black wrought iron fence with stone pillars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cobblestone street in a historic district, with the camera walking past a horse-drawn carriage. A grand white mansion with columns stands behind an iron fence on the right, while moss-draped trees line the left side of the street.

events.description: large oak tree temporarily blocks view of the street ahead
pedestrian in period clothing walks past on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the avenue, approaching the mansion gates while passing a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: man in top hat and dark coat walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive oak tree with sprawling branches covered in spanish moss
ornate metal gates with stone pillars marking estate entrance
vintage black street lamp with glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down the tree-lined avenue, passing close to a massive oak tree. A pedestrian in period attire walks by on the right as the camera approaches ornate metal gates leading to a grand estate.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand estate entrance with manicured lawn

events.description: passing through the estate gates from cobblestone street to manicured lawn
slowing down and panning slightly to view the mansion facade

agents.ego_description: walking through the estate gates and approaching the grand mansion, observing the architecture

notable_agents.action: figures standing on the mansion balcony observing the grounds

entered.detail: imposing three-story mansion with tall columns and ornate roof decorations
well-kept grass lawn leading up to the mansion entrance
second-floor balcony with decorative iron railings where figures stand

segments.scene_description: Passing through the ornate gates, the scene opens onto a wide lawn leading to a grand Southern Gothic mansion. The camera slows to take in the imposing facade with its tall columns and balcony, where several figures can be seen standing.

scene_state.functional_zone: estate grounds with mature trees and perimeter wall

events.description: turning left to circle around the mansion grounds
exiting the estate grounds back toward the cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: circling around the mansion grounds, looking up at the mature trees and architecture before exiting

entered.detail: tall cedar tree with dense dark foliage
tall brick wall marking the property boundary

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the mansion grounds, passing by a large cedar tree and the estate wall. Looking up at the sprawling branches against the foggy sky, the camera then turns back toward the gate, transitioning from the manicured lawn back to the cobblestone street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy historic district that transitions from a public cobblestone street into the private grounds of a grand Southern Gothic estate. It begins by walking past a horse-drawn carriage and a columned mansion behind an iron fence, with moss-draped trees lining the left side of the road. As the camera continues down the avenue, it passes a massive oak tree and a pedestrian in period attire before approaching and gliding through ornate metal gates. The scene then opens onto a wide, manicured lawn leading toward the imposing facade of a grand mansion where figures stand on a balcony. Finally, the camera circles the estate grounds past a large cedar tree and the perimeter wall before turning back toward the gates to return to the cobblestone street.
